# rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm { #skrom.rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm }

`rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm`

ECM-based hyperreduction for finite element bilinear forms.

This module in a way mirrors the ECSW implementation already present in the repository,
but promotes the weights from the element level to the element–Gauss-point
level. The assembly path stays the same at a high level:

1. restrict to active elements,
2. cluster elements by the number of free local DOFs,
3. extract local contributions,
4. project onto the reduced basis, and
5. accumulate the reduced operator.

## Assumption {.doc-section .doc-section-assumption}

The stored ECM weights are treated as multiplicative factors applied to
scikit-fem's native per-Gauss contributions ``form(...) * dx``. If an external
ECM code returns *absolute* cubature weights, convert them first using the
helper in ``skrom.rom.ecm.helpers``.

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm](#skrom.rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm.BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm) | Hyperreduced bilinear form assembled from ECM-selected Gauss points. |

### BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm { #skrom.rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm.BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm }

```python
rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm.BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm(
    form,
    gauss_weight,
    ubasis,
    lob,
    rob,
    vbasis=None,
    free_dofs=None,
    mean=None,
    nthreads=0,
    dtype=np.float64,
)
```

Hyperreduced bilinear form assembled from ECM-selected Gauss points.

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [assemble_weighted_ecm](#skrom.rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm.BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.assemble_weighted_ecm) | Assemble the reduced bilinear form using ECM Gauss-point weights. |
| [extract_element_matrices_qp_rom](#skrom.rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm.BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.extract_element_matrices_qp_rom) | Extract per-Gauss local element matrices. |

##### assemble_weighted_ecm { #skrom.rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm.BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.assemble_weighted_ecm }

```python
rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm.BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.assemble_weighted_ecm(
    **kwargs,
)
```

Assemble the reduced bilinear form using ECM Gauss-point weights.

##### extract_element_matrices_qp_rom { #skrom.rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm.BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.extract_element_matrices_qp_rom }

```python
rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm.BilinearFormHYPERROM_ecm.extract_element_matrices_qp_rom(
    ubasis,
    vbasis=None,
    elem_indices=None,
    **kwargs,
)
```

Extract per-Gauss local element matrices.

###### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name               | Type                                                   | Description                                                                                                                   |
|--------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| element_matrices_q | (ndarray, shape(n_elem, n_loc_test, n_loc_trial, n_q)) | Per-element local matrices resolved at Gauss points, already multiplied by ``basis.dx`` but not yet summed over Gauss points. |
